response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks documented people management experience beyond informal mentorship, has a current career gap, and no explicit evidence of managing teams or leading organizational change — key requirements for this managerial role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Strong cross-platform expertise including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and build/testing infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership roles
Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent engagement
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
